acholi.same_dots_just_turned_sideways_learn_o: Dots marom, giluko nget. Pwony fact acel, ngec aryo.
acholi.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: Man aye acel me Tricky 15 facts — set matidi ma mito recall me ada. Lokke i Practice → "Tricky 15" mode me drill-e.
acholi.same_numbers_four_faces_knowing_one_fa: Nambers marom, wang angwen. Ngeyo fact acel miyi mukene.
acholi.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Yer pattern me highlight. Table opong ki structure — ka ineno, nucu me facts doko predictable.
acholi.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 Dii pattern mo malo me tuko cells dok kwan rule. Patterns mapol gitwero overlap (labolle, 5×5 aye "5s multiple" ki "perfect square" ducu).
acholi.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: Imito memorize nucu adek keken me table.
acholi.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: Gin mo ma tye i 1s, 2s, 5s, 10s, 11s columns tye ki rule ma yot. Squares gin set matidi (facts 12). Ma odong aye "tricky middle" — facts 15 — ma mito recall me ada: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 ki twins gi.
acholi.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: Iwil 7×8? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Ger fact matek ki i aryo ma yot. Ka repetitions oromo, answer doko automatic.
acholi.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Visualize fact acel-acel calo area-model rectangle (Visual tab) onyo pattern (tab man) miyi yo me o i answer ma pe mito automatic recall. Recall gero mot mot, ento pe ki drilling keken.
acholi.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Cell acel-acel = multiplication fact. Color = mastery ni ma i o kwede. Dii cell mo me drill fact ni-gu.
acholi.fact_family_same_numbers_four_faces: 👨‍👩‍👧 Fact family — nambers marom, wang angwen
acholi.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Sliders pi mastery threshold ki selected factor. Discrete 3-state outcome. Pe score, pe reveal.
acholi.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Hypothesis: Threshold loko feedback nining pi lupwony ma tye ki peko?
acholi.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aniang — tit ki lok ni kikom
acholi.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Design note: discrete 3-state mastery marker; pe raw score; pe reveal — by design.
